mapper.insert: insert into jst_order_main ( order_no, order_type, business_type, user_id, participant_id, list_amount, coupon_amount, points_deduct_amount, points_used, platform_bear_amount, net_pay_amount, service_fee, pay_method, pay_initiator, pay_initiator_id, order_status, refund_status, allow_self_refund, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{businessType}, #{userId}, #{participantId}, #{listAmount}, #{couponAmount}, #{pointsDeductAmount}, #{pointsUsed}, #{platformBearAmount}, #{netPayAmount}, #{serviceFee}, #{payMethod}, #{payInitiator}, #{payInitiatorId}, #{orderStatus}, #{refundStatus}, #{allowSelfRefund}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.select: select * from jst_order_main where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select * from jst_payment_record where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' order by payment_id desc limit 1
